{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/ai-collaborations/continuation/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. continuation

_Файлов:_ 10

h2. Содержание

* [01-shared-memory-between-agents.md|01-shared-memory-between-agents.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [02-agentops-trace-envelope.md|02-agentops-trace-envelope.md] — 
* [03-a2a-vs-mcp-protocols.md|03-a2a-vs-mcp-protocols.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [04-memory-firewall-vs-prompt-worms.md|04-memory-firewall-vs-prompt-worms.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [05-roadmap-6-12-months.md|05-roadmap-6-12-months.md] — > [!TIP]
* [06-metrics-tree.md|06-metrics-tree.md] — 
* [07-vs-notion-mem-affine-langgraph.md|07-vs-notion-mem-affine-langgraph.md] — > [!WARNING]
* [08-commercialization-three-paths.md|08-commercialization-three-paths.md] — 
* [09-do-not-glue.md|09-do-not-glue.md] — 
* [10-architecture-rfc.md|10-architecture-rfc.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/limitations/README.md] (сходство 0.19)
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/architecture/README.md] (сходство 0.15)
* [README|docs/nautilus/supply-demand/README.md] (сходство 0.15)
